REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Text Ruling

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/No appearance by Defendant(s).
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Plaintiff JEREMIAH TAYLOR appearing on his own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant NATHAN LACHANCE.
Plaintiff Jeremiah Taylor sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2720 Clement Street (1st Room on the left), San Francisco, California 94121.
Damages $1,875.00
Holdover damages $437.43
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
for a Total Judgment of $2,312.43
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Adrian Colley; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff in pro per Jeremiah Taylor is present.
Defendant Nathan Lachance DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant Nathan Lachance. The trial date of SEP-21-2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
